flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Spoon River College rose 84% between 2007 and 2010 ($2.6k → $4.8k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Spoon River College rose 17% between 2021 and 2024 ($5.2k → $6.1k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Spoon River College rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($11.9k → $13.5k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Spoon River College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (7.5% → 0.0%).
